prompt: A highly detailed glossy anime idol portrait in a vertical composition, showing a cute teenage girl from the waist up in a dreamy pink kawaii aesthetic. She has pastel pink hair styled in a very long voluminous high ponytail with soft bangs and flowing curled strands, decorated with multiple small heart clips and crossed hairpins. Her eyes are large, sparkling, and vivid emerald green, with star-like highlights, long lashes, and a slightly teary shine. She has a soft blush, tiny glossy lips, and an affectionate expression while applying bright pink lipstick, holding the lipstick tube delicately with both hands near her mouth. She wears a frilly black-and-pink gothic lolita idol dress with lace, ribbons, bows, heart ornaments, and sparkling textures, plus 1 black lace bow headband with a pink jeweled heart, 3 visible hair accessories on her bangs, 1 pair of dangling heart earrings, and 1 black choker with a small heart charm. Surround the character with a glowing, glitter-filled, candy-pink background full of bokeh, sparkles, soft neon light effects, and idol-fan atmosphere. Add 5 glowing hand-drawn heart text bubbles in Japanese around her, reading: "かわいすぎてごめん…♡", "推してくれてありがとうっ♡", "ずーっとだいすきっ♡", "世界でいちばんの推しになってね…♡", and "ずっと一緒だよ？約束ね…♡". Include a small decorated photo card or poster of the same girl in the upper right background. Ultra-polished illustration, dense shimmer, romantic lighting, glossy highlights, intricate lace detail, soft-focus background, saturated pink palette, adorable idol poster feel.
